comment: Absolutely love this piece. The fabric is premium and the fit is exactly what I expected. Will definitely be ordering more.
Great quality shirt. Feels luxurious and looks sharp. Slightly longer than expected but nothing a tuck can't fix.
Good shirt but runs a bit small. I usually wear M and had to size up to L. Quality of the material is still great though.
Best shirt I've bought this year. The stitching is perfect and it holds its shape after washing.
Very clean look. Perfect for both office and casual settings. A little pricey but worth it.
These chinos are incredible. The color is exactly as shown and the slim fit is perfect.
Really solid pants. Comfortable for all day wear and look great with a blazer.
Runs quite large for me. The quality is fine but I had to return and size down. Sizing chart needs updating.
This merino wool is exceptional. Incredibly soft against the skin and keeps you warm without bulk.
Perfect layering piece. Wore it under a jacket and got compliments all evening.
Great quality wool. Fits slightly small across the shoulders but the length is perfect.
This jacket is worth every cent. The technical fabric is windproof and looks sharp.
Excellent jacket. Fits true to size and has great pocket placement. Very functional.
Good jacket but the zipper feels a bit cheap for the price point. Overall still a solid buy.
Classic tee done right. The weight of the fabric is perfect — not too thin, not too heavy.
Simple and clean. Holds its shape after multiple washes. Great everyday essential.
These shoes are stunning. Comfortable from the first wear and the leather quality is top notch.
Very stylish. Runs slightly narrow but stretched comfortably after a day of wear.
Best accessory purchase this year. The craftsmanship is incredible and very eye-catching.
Nice design but the clasp feels a bit flimsy. Hope it holds up long term. Will update review.
Absolute head turner. The detailing on this is incredible. Wore it to an event and received so many compliments.
Premium quality as expected. Fits slightly large so size down if between sizes.
Really well made. The material feels premium and the cut is modern without being too trendy.
Exceeded my expectations. The attention to detail on this product is remarkable.
Great product overall. Packaging was also very impressive which adds to the experience.
Perfect fit and outstanding quality. This is my third purchase from OnlyMen and they never disappoint.
Decent product but not quite what I expected from the photos. The color is slightly different in person.
Absolutely love this. Bought it as a gift and the recipient was blown away. Will be back for more.
High quality and well worth the investment. Looks even better in person than in the photos.
Incredible product. The materials feel luxurious and the craftsmanship is evident in every detail.
